events.name: Approval Requested
events.description: Requester triggered an approvable action + engine created an instance. Feeds approval-flow funnel + tenant governance-adoption dashboards.

events.name: Approval Decided
events.description: An approver decided (approve or reject). was_delegated=true when the approver is acting under an active RoleDelegation.

events.name: Approval Executed
events.description: The final approval kicked off the underlying action + it ran successfully.

events.name: Approval Template Created
events.description: Tenant admin authored a new template. Feeds governance-adoption metrics + product-marketing benchmarks.

events.name: Approval Template Preflight
events.description: Template author dry-ran an expression + selector via the preflight endpoint. Adoption signal for the authoring UI.

events.name: Approval Delegation Substitution
events.description: DelegationSubstitutedApprover fired — a delegate replaced their delegator in resolved_approvers. Aggregated only; specific delegator/delegate ids NOT sent to Segment.
